goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'cinema' and should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'entrance fee'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'leicester' and should 'arrive by 08:00'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should leave on 'sunday'.
Make sure you get 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of cinema and should be in the centre
Make sure you get address and entrance fee
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from leicester and should arrive by 08:00
The train should go to cambridge and should leave on sunday
Make sure you get travel time
